headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 14, 2026**
article:
The Colorado Rockies suffered a 7-2 loss to the Pittsburgh Pirates, with Ryan O'Hearn leading the Rockies' offense. The Washington Nationals fell to a historic 15-1 defeat at the hands of the Cincinnati Reds, with JJ Bleday leading the Nationals' offense. The New York Mets secured a 9-4 victory over the Detroit Tigers, with Nolan McLean earning the win.

Several players have been placed on the injured list, impacting their team's availability. Chase Dollander, a right-handed pitcher for the Colorado Rockies, has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to a right elbow strain. Other players on the injured list include Cal Raleigh of the Seattle Mariners, Jimmy Herget of the Colorado Rockies, Brooks Kriske of the Athletics, Robby Snelling of the Miami Marlins, Francisco Alvarez of the New York Mets, Rhett Lowder of the Cincinnati Reds, and Drew Pomeranz of the Los Angeles Angels.

Several trades and roster movements have taken place. The Baltimore Orioles acquired RHP Eduarniel Núñez from the Athletics in exchange for cash. The Athletics also traded LHP José Suarez to the Athletics for cash. Other trades include the Los Angeles Dodgers trading OF Jose Requena to the Arizona Diamondbacks for CF Alek Thomas and the San Francisco Giants trading C Patrick Bailey to the Cleveland Guardians for LHP Matt Wilkinson and other considerations.

top_news.title: **Rockies Fall to Pirates in 7-2 Loss**
top_news.summary: The Colorado Rockies suffered a 7-2 defeat at the hands of the Pittsburgh Pirates, with Ryan O'Hearn leading the Rockies' offense with 3 hits, 1 home run, and 2 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Nationals Suffer Historic Loss to Reds**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals fell to a 15-1 defeat at the hands of the Cincinnati Reds, marking a lopsided victory for the home team. JJ Bleday led the Nationals' offense with a 3-hit, 2-home run performance, driving in 6 runs.

top_news.title: **Mets Take Down Tigers 9-4**
top_news.summary: The New York Mets secured a 9-4 victory over the Detroit Tigers, with Nolan McLean earning the win after pitching 7.0 innings with 7 strikeouts and 3 earned runs. Gage Workman led the Tigers' offense with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 3 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Twins Rout Marlins 9-1**
top_news.summary: The Minnesota Twins dominated the Miami Marlins, securing a 9-1 victory. Austin Martin led the Twins' offense with 2 hits, 3 RBIs, and a key single that scored James Outman.

top_news.title: **Rockies RHP Chase Dollander Lands on Injured List**
top_news.summary: Colorado Rockies right-handed pitcher Chase Dollander has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to a right elbow strain.

top_news.title: **Orioles Acquire Eduarniel Núñez in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles have acquired RHP Eduarniel Núñez from the Athletics in exchange for cash. This move adds depth to the Orioles' pitching staff.
